title: Automated patron identification and communication management
abstract: A system and method for automated patron identification and communication management, comprising a patron management server that receives location and ID information from a plurality of client devices via a network, directs a display manager, and retrieves patron information from a patron profile data store; a display manager that presents patron information for viewing; and a patron profile data store that stores and provides patron information. A system for proximity-based patron relationship management, comprising a patron management server that receives location and ID information from a plurality of client devices via a network, directs a patron interaction manager, and retrieves patron information from a patron profile data store; a patron interaction manager that presents patron information for interaction; and a patron profile data store that stores and provides patron information. A system for proximity-based patron discovery and group creation, comprising a patron management server that receives location and ID information from a plurality of client devices via a network, directs a patron interaction manager, groups client devices based on information similarities, and produces group information for a group; and a display manager that presents group information for review.
claims:
Claims What is claimed is: 1. A system for automated patron identification and communication management, comprising: a patron management server comprising at least a plurality of programming instructions stored in a memory and operating on a processor of a network-connected computing device and configured to receive data via a network from a plurality of client devices, the data comprising at least geolocation information and a device identifier, and configured to retrieve patron information from a patron profile data store based at least in part on the device identifier, and configured to direct the operation of a display manager; a display manager comprising at least a plurality of programming instructions stored in a memory and operating on a processor of a network-connected computing device and configured to present at least a portion of the patron information to a human user for review, the presentation being based at least in part on direction from the patron management server; and a patron profile data store comprising at least a plurality of programming instructions stored in a memory and operating on a processor of a network-connected computing device and configured to store and provide patron information to other system components. 2. The system of claim 1 , wherein the device identifier comprises a hardware MAC address. 3. The system of claim 1 , wherein the device identifier comprises a device network address. 4. The system of claim 1 , wherein the device identifier comprises a text-based identifier. 5. The system of claim 4, wherein the text-based identifier comprises a username representing a particular user account within a particular software application. 6. The system of claim 1 , wherein the display manager is further configured to receive interaction from a human user, and is further configured to direct the operation of a connected hardware display device based at least in part on the interaction. 7. A method for automatic patron identification, comprising the steps of: receiving, at a patron management server comprising at least a plurality of programming instructions stored in a memory and operating on a processor of a network-connected computing device and configured to receive data via a network from a plurality of client devices, the data comprising at least geolocation information and a device identifier, and 

 configured to retrieve patron information from a patron profile data store based at least in part on the device identifier, and configured to direct the operation of a display manager, geolocation information and device identifiers from a plurality of patron devices via a network; retrieving, using a patron profile data store comprising at least a plurality of programming instructions stored in a memory and operating on a processor of a network-connected computing device and configured to store and provide patron information to other system components, a plurality of patron information based at least in part on a received device identifier; providing at least a portion of the patron information to the patron management server; directing the operation of a display manager based at least in part on the patron information; and presenting, via a display manager comprising at least a plurality of programming instructions stored in a memory and operating on a processor of a network-connected computing device and configured to display information on a connected hardware display device based at least in part on direction from the patron management server, at least a portion of the patron information to a human user for review. 8. A system for proximity-based patron relationship management, comprising: a patron management server comprising at least a plurality of programming instructions stored in a memory and operating on a processor of a network-connected computing device and configured to receive data via a network from a plurality of client devices, the data comprising at least geolocation information and a device identifier, and configured to retrieve patron information from a patron profile data store based at least in part on the device identifier, and configured to direct the operation of a patron interaction manager, and configured to receive interaction information from a patron interaction manager, and configured to direct the operation of a patron profile data store based at least in part on at least a portion of the interaction information, and configured to transmit notification information to a plurality of devices via a network; a patron interaction manager comprising at least a plurality of programming instructions stored in a memory and operating on a processor of a network-connected computing device and configured to present at least a portion of the patron information to a human user for review, the presentation being based at least in part on direction from the patron management 

 server, and configured to receive interaction from a user, and configured to provide at least a portion of the interaction information to the patron management server; and a patron profile data store comprising at least a plurality of programming instructions stored in a memory and operating on a processor of a network-connected computing device and configured to store and provide patron information to other system components. 9. The system of claim 8, wherein the device identifier comprises a hardware MAC address. 10. The system of claim 8, wherein the device identifier comprises a device network address. 1 1. The system of claim 8, wherein the device identifier comprises a text-based identifier. 12. The system of claim 1 1 , wherein the text-based identifier comprises a username representing a particular user account within a particular software application. 13. A method for proximity-based patron relationship management, comprising the steps of: receiving, at a patron management server comprising at least a plurality of programming instructions stored in a memory and operating on a processor of a network-connected computing device and configured to receive data via a network from a plurality of client devices, the data comprising at least geolocation information and a device identifier, and configured to retrieve patron information from a patron profile data store based at least in part on the device identifier, and configured to direct the operation of a patron interaction manager, and configured to receive interaction information from a patron interaction manager, and configured to direct the operation of a patron profile data store based at least in part on at least a portion of the interaction information, and configured to transmit notification information to a plurality of devices via a network, geolocation information and device identifiers from a plurality of client devices via a network; retrieving, using a patron profile data store comprising at least a plurality of programming instructions stored in a memory and operating on a processor of a network-connected computing device and configured to store and provide patron information to other system components, a plurality of patron information based at least in part on a received device identifier; providing at least a portion of the patron information to the patron management server; directing the operation of a patron interaction manager based at least in part on the patron information; 

 presenting, via a patron interaction manager comprising at least a plurality of programming instructions stored in a memory and operating on a processor of a network- connected computing device and configured to present at least a portion of the patron information to a human user for review, the presentation being based at least in part on direction from the patron management server, and configured to receive interaction from a user, and configured to provide at least a portion of the interaction information to the patron management server, at least a portion of the patron information to a human user for review; receiving interaction from a human user; providing at least a portion of the interaction information to the patron management server; and updating, via the patron profile data store, at least a portion of the patron information based at least in part on at least a portion of the interaction information. 14. The method of claim 13, further comprising the step of acknowledging, at the patron profile data store, completion of the update. 15. The method of claim 13, further comprising the step of notifying, via the patron management server, a plurality of user devices of the update. 16. A system for proximity-based patron discovery and group creation, comprising: a patron management server comprising at least a plurality of programming instructions stored in a memory and operating on a processor of a network-connected computing device and configured to receive data via a network from a plurality of client devices, the data comprising at least geolocation information and a device identifier, and configured to identify a plurality of information similarities between the plurality of client devices, and configured to group at least a portion of the plurality of client devices based at least in part on at least a portion of the information similarities, and configured to determine group information based at least in part on at least a portion of the information similarities, and configured to broadcast at least a portion of the group information via a network, and configured to direct the operation of a display manager; a display manager comprising at least a plurality of programming instructions stored in a memory and operating on a processor of a network-connected computing device and configured to present at least a portion of the patron information to a human user for review, the presentation being based at least in part on direction from the patron management server. 17. The system of claim 16, wherein the device identifier comprises a hardware MAC address. 18. The system of claim 16, wherein the device identifier comprises a device network address. 19. The system of claim 16, wherein the device identifier comprises a text-based identifier. 20. The system of claim 19, wherein the text-based identifier comprises a username representing a particular user account within a particular software application. 21. The system of claim 16, wherein the patron management server is further configured to receive group information via a network, and to direct the operation of the display manager based at least in part on received group information. 22. A method for proximity-based patron discovery and group creation, comprising the steps of: receiving, at a patron management server comprising at least a plurality of programming instructions stored in a memory and operating on a processor of a network-connected computing device and configured to receive data via a network from a plurality of client devices, the data comprising at least geolocation information and a device identifier, and configured to identify a plurality of information similarities between the plurality of client devices, and configured to group at least a portion of the plurality of client devices based at least in part on at least a portion of the information similarities, and configured to determine group information based at least in part on at least a portion of the information similarities, and configured to broadcast at least a portion of the group information via a network, and configured to direct the operation of a display manager, geolocation information and device identifiers from a plurality of client devices via a network; identifying a plurality of information similarities between at least a portion of the client devices, the information similarities being based at least in part on each device's respective location information; forming a group based at least in part on the information similarities; producing group information based at least in part on the information similarities; and presenting, via a display manager comprising at least a plurality of programming instructions stored in a memory and operating on a processor of a network-connected computing device and configured to present at least a portion of the patron information to a 

 human user for review, the presentation being based at least in part on direction from the patron management server, at least a portion of the group information to a human user for review.
